name: 实验设计
subject: science
domain_name: 科学探究 / Scientific Inquiry / Scientific Inquiry
curriculum_points: Students in MYP 2-5 will be able to design a controlled experiment, identifying and justifying the control of variables (independent, dependent, controlled) to ensure a fair test.
Students will be able to select appropriate equipment and methods, and describe a logical, safe procedure to collect sufficient and relevant data.
